Accessibility Statement

The Unified Framework Collective is committed to making our website accessible to all users. We aim to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA. This site is built as a static site using semantic HTML and does not contain complex interactive elements that would create significant accessibility barriers. We use sufficient colour contrast, legible fonts, and descriptive text for all content elements. If you experience any accessibility issues with our website, please contact us via our LinkedIn page and we will do our best to address them.

The Unified Framework Collective
